description: A few words from a state document in Arabic script, mentioning the name Saʿīd (or likely urging someone to exert effort (fī dhālik ijtihād) to obtain (li-yuʾaddī ilā) a fortunate (saʿīd) outcome). Reused on recto for liturgical text in Hebrew. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
